body_text.description: Composed digest body, ready for delivery via outbound() once the validation guard passes. Empty string on the on_failure defensive default.

claimed_event_ids.description: Every calendar event id, commitment id, task id, or recurrence id referenced in body_text. The pipeline's validation guard checks each entry against the input payload — fabrication zeroes the message per [BUILD.md §1289].

validation_failed.description: Skill-side flag (true on the on_failure defensive-default path); the pipeline-side validation guard sets the canonical value on the emitted digest.composed event.

reasons.description: Reasons array; on_failure populates with skill_failure_defensive_default.
